mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS city_cnt FROM fd_company c JOIN fd_device d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id WHERE c.biz_type = 'SBIZ0050' AND c.isUse = '1' AND c.isFDSTest = '0';

SELECT c.comp_id, c.comp_nm, c.address, s.safety_nm AS emp_nm, s.safety_phone AS emp_phone, COUNT(d.device_id) AS cnt FROM fd_company c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT comp_id, safety_nm, safety_phone FROM fd_safety_info WHERE isDel = '0' GROUP BY comp_id ) s ON c.comp_id = s.comp_id JOIN fd_device d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id WHERE c.biz_type = 'SBIZ0050' AND c.isUse = '1' AND c.isFDSTest = '0' GROUP BY c.comp_id ORDER BY c.comp_nm;

SELECT A.*, IF(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,A.tran_dttm,NOW()) >= 25, '통신점검', '정상') AS comm_stts, IF(CH1 + CH2 >= 100, '설치점검', '정상') AS install_stts FROM ( SELECT c.group_comp_nm, d.serial_no, cu.cust_nm, cu.cust_addr, co1.code_nm, CASE WHEN LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 10 AND LEFT(m.piece_number, 1) = 'D' THEN '대성' WHEN LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 16 OR LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 9 THEN '대명' WHEN LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 7 THEN '코엠텍' WHEN LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 12 THEN CASE SUBSTRING(m.piece_number, 3, 1) WHEN '0' THEN '피에스텍' WHEN '1' THEN '극동' WHEN '2' THEN '위지트' WHEN '3' THEN '대성' WHEN '4' THEN '에스씨지그리드' WHEN '5' THEN '동해' WHEN '6' THEN '대명아이티' WHEN '7' THEN '신한' WHEN '8' THEN '태광' WHEN '9' THEN '지텍' ELSE '미확인' END ELSE '미확인' END AS meter_manufacturer, DATE_FORMAT(hl.tran_dttm, '%y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS tran_dttm, IFNULL(IFNULL(t6.line1_ecnt, bt6.line1_ecnt), te6.line1_ecnt) AS CH1, IFNULL(IFNULL(t6.line2_ecnt, bt6.line2_ecnt), te6.line2_ecnt) AS CH2 FROM fd_company c JOIN fd_device d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id JOIN fd_custmst cu ON d.comp_id = cu.comp_id AND d.device_id = cu.device_id AND cu.isDel = '0' JOIN fd_codemst co1 ON cu.cust_mtr_type = co1.code_cd AND co1.isUse = '1' JOIN fd_info_meter m ON d.comp_id = m.comp_id AND d.device_id = m.device_id AND cu.cust_id = m.cust_id AND m.isDel = '0' LEFT JOIN fd_tran_meter_history_lst hl ON d.device_id = hl.device_id LEFT JOIN fd_tran_600 t6 ON d.device_id = t6.device_id AND t6.tran_dttm = hl.tran_dttm LEFT JOIN fd_bak_tran_600 bt6 ON d.device_id = bt6.device_id AND bt6.tran_dttm = hl.tran_dttm LEFT JOIN fd_tran_600_event te6 ON d.device_id = te6.device_id AND te6.tran_dttm = hl.tran_dttm WHERE c.biz_type = 'SBIZ0050' AND c.isFDSTest = '0' AND d.device_model IN ('P000018','P000019','P000020','P000021','P000022')
UNION ALL
SELECT c.group_comp_nm, d.serial_no, cu.cust_nm, cu.cust_addr, co1.code_nm, CASE WHEN LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 10 AND LEFT(m.piece_number, 1) = 'D' THEN '대성' WHEN LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 16 OR LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 9 THEN '대명' WHEN LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 7 THEN '코엠텍' WHEN LENGTH(m.piece_number) = 12 THEN CASE SUBSTRING(m.piece_number, 3, 1) WHEN '0' THEN '피에스텍' WHEN '1' THEN '극동' WHEN '2' THEN '위지트' WHEN '3' THEN '대성' WHEN '4' THEN '에스씨지그리드' WHEN '5' THEN '동해' WHEN '6' THEN '대명아이티' WHEN '7' THEN '신한' WHEN '8' THEN '태광' WHEN '9' THEN '지텍' ELSE '미확인' END ELSE '미확인' END AS meter_manufacturer, DATE_FORMAT(hl.tran_dttm, '%y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS tran_dttm, IFNULL(IFNULL(t6.used_line1_ecnt, bt6.used_line1_ecnt), te6.used_line1_ecnt) AS CH1, IFNULL(IFNULL(t6.used_line2_ecnt, bt6.used_line2_ecnt), te6.used_line2_ecnt) AS CH2 FROM fd_company c JOIN fd_device d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id JOIN fd_custmst cu ON d.comp_id = cu.comp_id AND d.device_id = cu.device_id AND cu.isDel = '0' JOIN fd_codemst co1 ON cu.cust_mtr_type = co1.code_cd AND co1.isUse = '1' JOIN fd_info_meter m ON d.comp_id = m.comp_id AND d.device_id = m.device_id AND cu.cust_id = m.cust_id AND m.isDel = '0' LEFT JOIN fd_tran_meter_history_lst hl ON d.device_id = hl.device_id LEFT JOIN fd_tran_300_gl t6 ON d.device_id = t6.device_id AND t6.tran_dttm = hl.tran_dttm LEFT JOIN fd_bak_tran_300_gl bt6 ON d.device_id = bt6.device_id AND bt6.tran_dttm = hl.tran_dttm LEFT JOIN fd_tran_300_gl_event te6 ON d.device_id = te6.device_id AND te6.tran_dttm = hl.tran_dttm WHERE c.biz_type = 'SBIZ0050' AND c.comp_id <> '12682' AND c.isFDSTest = '0' AND c.isUse = '1' AND d.device_model IN ('P000023','P000024') ) A WHERE TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,A.tran_dttm,NOW()) >= 25 OR A.CH1 >= 2 OR A.CH2 >= 2 ORDER BY A.group_comp_nm, A.serial_no

SELECT COUNT(*) AS tank_cnt FROM fd_company c JOIN fd_device d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id WHERE c.biz_type = 'SBIZ0020' AND c.isUse = '1' AND c.isFDSTest = '0' AND d.device_model IN ('P000025', 'P000030', 'P000034', 'P000037') AND c.root_id != '12316';

SELECT c1.comp_id, c1.comp_nm, c1.address, s.safety_nm AS emp_nm, s.safety_phone AS emp_phone, COUNT(d.device_id) AS cnt FROM fd_company c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT comp_id, safety_nm, safety_phone FROM fd_safety_info WHERE isDel = '0' GROUP BY comp_id ) s ON c.comp_id = s.comp_id JOIN fd_company c1 ON c.root_id = c1.comp_id AND c1.isUse = '1' JOIN fd_device d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id WHERE c.biz_type = 'SBIZ0020' AND c.isUse = '1' AND c.isFDSTest = '0' AND d.device_model IN ('P000025', 'P000030', 'P000034', 'P000037') AND c.root_id != '12316' # 청송그린에너지는 제외 GROUP BY c1.root_id;

SELECT c.group_comp_nm, d.serial_no, co.cust_nm, co.cust_addr, DATE_FORMAT(hl.tran_dttm, '%y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS tran_dttm, hl.tran_type, hl.remain1_percent, hl.remain2_percent, CASE WHEN hl.remain1_percent = '0' OR remain2_percent = '0' THEN '게이지점검' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,hl.tran_dttm,NOW()) >= 25 THEN '통신점검' ELSE '기타' END AS error_stts FROM fd_device d JOIN fd_company c ON d.comp_id = c.comp_id AND c.isUse = '1' AND c.isFDSTest = '0' JOIN fd_info_tank t ON d.comp_id = t.comp_id AND d.device_id = t.device_id AND t.isDel = '0' JOIN fd_custmst co ON t.comp_id = co.comp_id AND t.device_id = co.device_id AND t.cust_id = co.cust_id AND co.isDel = '0' JOIN fd_tran_tank_history_lst hl ON d.device_id = hl.device_id WHERE d.device_model IN ('P000025','P000030') AND ( TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,hl.tran_dttm,NOW()) >= 25 OR (remain1_percent = '0' OR remain2_percent = '0') ) GROUP BY d.device_id ORDER BY c.group_comp_nm, d.serial_no;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS cbt_cnt FROM fd_company c JOIN fd_device d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id JOIN fd_info_node n ON d.device_id = n.device_id AND n.node_type = 'NODE0004' AND n.isDel = '0' WHERE c.biz_type = 'SBIZ0020' AND c.isUse = '1' AND c.isFDSTest = '0' AND d.device_model IN ('P000013')

SELECT c.comp_id, c.comp_nm, c.address, s.safety_nm AS emp_nm, s.safety_phone, COUNT(d.device_id) AS cnt FROM fd_company c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT comp_id, safety_nm, safety_phone FROM fd_safety_info WHERE isDel = '0' GROUP BY comp_id ) s ON c.comp_id = s.comp_id JOIN fd_device d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id JOIN fd_info_node n ON d.device_id = n.device_id AND n.node_type = 'NODE0004' AND n.isDel = '0' WHERE c.biz_type = 'SBIZ0020' AND c.isUse = '1' AND c.isFDSTest = '0' AND d.device_model IN ('P000013') GROUP BY c.comp_id;

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT co.group_comp_nm , d.serial_no , c.cust_nm , c.cust_addr , c.latitude , c.longitude , (SELECT rsrp FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS AP_rsrp , n1.node_no AS RD_node_no , (SELECT MAX(tran_dttm) FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n1.node_no) AS RD_tran_dttm , (SELECT rssi FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n1.node_no ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS RD_rssi , (SELECT battery FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n1.node_no ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS RD_battery_adc , n2.node_no AS RS_node_no , (SELECT MAX(tran_dttm) FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n2.node_no) AS RS_tran_dttm , (SELECT rssi FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n2.node_no ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS RS_rssi , (SELECT battery FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n2.node_no ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS RS_battery_adc , n3.node_no AS RV_node_no , (SELECT MAX(tran_dttm) FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n3.node_no) AS RV_tran_dttm , (SELECT rssi FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n3.node_no ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS RV_rssi , (SELECT battery FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n3.node_no ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS RV_battery_adc , (SELECT water_temp_adc FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n3.node_no ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS RV_temp_adc , (SELECT water_temp FROM fd_loradata WHERE device_id = d.device_id AND node_no = n3.node_no ORDER BY tran_dttm DESC LIMIT 1) AS RV_temp FROM fd_device d JOIN fd_company co ON d.comp_id = co.comp_id AND co.isUse = '1' AND co.isFDSTest = '0' LEFT JOIN fd_info_node n1 ON d.device_id = n1.device_id AND n1.node_type = 'NODE0001' # fd-538RD LEFT JOIN fd_info_node n2 ON d.device_id = n2.device_id AND n2.node_type = 'NODE0002' # fd-600RS LEFT JOIN fd_info_node n3 ON d.device_id = n3.device_id AND n3.node_type = 'NODE0004' # fd-600RV JOIN fd_custmst c ON c.isDel = '0' AND n3.cust_id = c.cust_id AND n3.isDel = '0' WHERE d.device_model = 'P000013' GROUP BY d.serial_no ORDER BY d.serial_no ) A WHERE A.RD_tran_dttm < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 HOUR) OR A.RS_tran_dttm < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 HOUR) OR A.RV_tran_dttm < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 25 HOUR)
